item.name: Add a moderator to a forum

request.name: Add a moderator to a forum

item.name: Remove a moderator from a forum

request.name: Remove a moderator from a forum

description.content: REST API for Disqus comments, threads, forums, users, and categories. Read and write operations are authenticated using an API key and secret, with OAuth 2.0 access tokens for user-context operations. All endpoints are served under https://disqus.com/api/3.0/.
